calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Failure To Post Jury Fees

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael McCloskey, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Luz Hotel.
Virgilio Candari, owner of the Luz Hotel, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Anthony Scott.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 20, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Luz Hotel, and against defendant Anthony Scott as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $600.00.
Holdover Damages - $1,232.50.
Costs - $220.00.

Total - $2,052.50.

Additionally, plaintiff Luz Hotel is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 725 Geary Street, Room 14, San Francisco, CA 94109. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-28-2010 Off Calendar
